scope_note: Task mutation_scope_refs name systemd/units/, config/prometheus/, agents/ — but both storm sources live in scripts/ (album-identifier.py, private-broadcast-echo-probe.py). Task Scope text names the storms explicitly; proceeded per Scope text and flagged here + in the PR per prep-packet D4.

findings.claim: ~40 S1/S2-constituent repo unit files had no OnFailure= and no probe — they failed silently (audit universal 'watcher dies' class).
findings.fix: OnFailure=notify-failure@%n.service added to 39 unit files; codex-claim-audit.service exempted (exit 1 = issues-found by design, posts its own ntfy; OnFailure would double-notify). Frozen map + exemptions pinned by tests/test_s1s2_onfailure_coverage.py (pattern: wgsl affordance coverage pin).

findings.claim: Live Prometheus (podium llm-stack) evaluated ZERO rule groups; deployed prometheus.yml had no rule_files stanza and was unversioned.
findings.fix: Repo SSOT created: config/prometheus/prometheus.yml (canonical deployed copy + rule_files) + rules/hapax-observability.yml with 4 alert rules (HapaxExporterDown, HapaxPrivateBroadcastEchoLeak, HapaxEchoProbeStale, HapaxLufsPanicStorm). Honest scope: no alertmanager exists; rules are evaluated+visible only, ntfy bridge is follow-on. Deploy procedure in config/prometheus/README.md. Review round 1 (codex-1): HapaxEchoProbeStale gained an absent() arm — bare time()-metric>300 is an empty vector (silent) when the series never existed, which is exactly the W4-TEXTFILE-ORPHAN failure mode.

findings.claim: :9483 (daimonion CPAL), :9484 (lufs-panic-cap), :9498 (yt telemetry) all UP and serving metrics but absent from prometheus.yml; litellm scrape down with 401 since master-key rollout.
findings.fix: Three scrape jobs added (project=hapax-council labels); litellm job gains authorization.credentials_file=/etc/prometheus/litellm-key materialized at deploy from llm-stack .env (key never in repo).
recheck_cmds: ssh hapax-podium.local "bash -c 'curl -s 127.0.0.1:9090/api/v1/targets | jq -r \".data.activeTargets[] | \\\"\\(.labels.job) \\(.health)\\\"\"'"  # post-merge: 9483/9484/9498 jobs up, litellm up

findings.claim: NEW (beyond task text): node_exporter serves 0 hapax_ metrics while /var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector/ holds the whole audio M-suite + echo-probe + recovery .prom files; the Arch unit lacks --collector.textfile.directory. Second orphan dir at ~/.local/share/node_exporter/textfile_collector/ (live-surface-guard).
findings.fix: Documented in config/prometheus/README.md step 4 (conf.d flag + consolidation). Requires sudo on podium — outside repo mutation surface.

findings.claim: scripts/album-identifier.py raised ValueError('No album currently identified') inside the PNG-save try on every poll tick of the routine no-album state; blanket except logged ERROR+traceback — 776 ERR in 6h (~129/h). Unit file was unversioned on podium.
findings.fix: No-album state gated BEFORE the try with _no_album_logged transition latch (one INFO per transition); log.exception reserved for real save failures. Unit versioned at systemd/units/album-identifier.service (+.d/memory.conf) with OnFailure=. Pinned by tests/test_album_identifier_polarity.py. Review round 1 (codex-1, PR #4106): gate extracted to _album_cover_save_allowed() with behavioral tests driving the real branch (50-tick storm scenario, latch re-arm, boot-state {}); unit release-root pinned per audit-w1 #4090 pattern instead of the mutable main clone.
recheck_cmds: ssh hapax-podium.local "bash -c 'journalctl --user -u album-identifier.service --since \"-1h\" | grep -c \"No album currently identified\"'"  # post-deploy+restart: < 10

findings.claim: Echo probe threshold 0.05 sat INSIDE the ambient correlated-hum band (clean ticks witnessed 0.033-0.066) and ntfy fired unconditionally per 30s breach tick: 874→2,823→1,970 LEAK ntfys/day — alert fatigue that buries real leaks (real-leak band witnessed Jun 9-10: 0.21-1.00).
findings.fix: Root-cause calibration + alert design, invariant NOT muted: default threshold 0.15 (flag overridable), 3 consecutive breach ticks before first ntfy, ≥15min per-episode cooldown (state file ~/.cache/hapax/private-broadcast-echo-probe-state.json), textfile gauge + new _collect_ts inertness stamp written EVERY tick, exit codes 0/2/3 unchanged. Durable alert path is the Prometheus rule pair (leak >0.15 for 2m; probe-stale >300s). Pinned by tests/test_private_broadcast_echo_probe.py (21 tests).
recheck_cmds: ssh hapax-podium.local "bash -c 'journalctl --user -u hapax-private-broadcast-echo-probe.service --since \"-24h\" | grep -c LEAK'"  # post-deploy steady state: < 50/day
ssh hapax-podium.local "bash -c 'cat /var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector/hapax_private_broadcast_echo.prom'"  # gauge + collect_ts updating every 30s

findings.claim: Parked GStreamer compositor's :9482 scrape job still registered — permanently-down target; honesty cuts both ways (a stale registration trains operators to ignore 'down').
findings.fix: Job commented out in repo prometheus.yml with re-enable note bound to compositor unpark; HapaxExporterDown rule description documents the invariant (registered ⇒ expected up).
recheck_cmds: ssh hapax-podium.local "bash -c 'curl -s 127.0.0.1:9090/api/v1/targets | jq -r .data.activeTargets[].labels.job | grep -c studio-compositor || true'"  # post-merge: 0 while parked

findings.fix: Deferred to the audit-w1 release-pinning class (S2 wave). tabbyapi exempt: external project root, council source-activation machinery does not serve it.
recheck_cmds: grep -L 'source-activation' systemd/units/hapax-cc-hygiene.service systemd/units/hapax-coord.service systemd/units/hapax-lane-reaper.service  # empty when the w1 S2 wave lands
